description: Style NoteWith its classic cut and purple hue, this polo t-shirt from scullers has the look and feel of an old favourite. This piece will make a timeless addition to your off-duty collection - wear it with everything from cargo shorts in the summer to a sweater and jeans in a colder seasonProduct DetailsPurple polo t-shirt that has a tipped collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs that have green and white tipping, buttoned chest placket, embroidered branding on the left chest and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cold at 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry low and dry inside-out in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegularThe model (height:6' and shoulders:18") is wearing a size L
